title: Simple Glowing Ores
description: Make ores glow in the dark
body:
Texture Pack for 1.13+ - Optifine Required

This texture pack make ores glow in the dark, this effect is compatibles with shaders to make nice glowing effects.
There is a faithfull version for 32x and a normal version for 16x, another optionnal texture pack make ores items glow in the dark (optionnal)

How it work?

Simple, you install the texture pack (ignore the warning if you using the 1.13+ version) then go on your game.
**Warning: Check if your server allow it before any use on multiplayer** Optifine is required with emissives textures ON
